# kCTFontManagerBundleIdentifier | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontManagerBundleIdentifier ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagerbundleidentifier)

-  kCTFontManagerBundleIdentifier 

Global Variable# kCTFontManagerBundleIdentifier

macOS 10.6+

```
let kCTFontManagerBundleIdentifier: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagerbundleidentifier#Discussion)

The Font Manager bundle identifier to be used when getting or setting global auto-activation using [`CTFontManagerGetAutoActivationSetting(_:)`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagergetautoactivationsetting(_:)) or [`CTFontManagerSetAutoActivationSetting(_:_:)`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagersetautoactivationsetting(_:_:)).
